home.welcome: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a developer passionate about building modern web applications.
home.name: Wali Sylla
home.description: I'm Wali, a full-stack developer passionate about web application development and new technologies. My curiosity and eagerness to learn drive me to see every project through with precision. Thanks to my diverse experiences (professional, athletic, etc.) and my adaptability, I easily integrate into a team and fully commit to challenges and goals.
